summary: Certificate Management System fully tested. Backend: 13/15 tests passed (2 skipped - no pending data for rejection test). Frontend: All UI flows verified including public certificate request page, certificate management dashboard, and public verification page.

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on login form fields - not a blocker but reduces testability

critical_code_review_comments: Certificate Management System implemented correctly with all required features
Certificate Manager role properly added to UserRole enum and visible in admin dropdown
Public endpoints correctly configured without authentication: GET /api/public/enrollment/{enrollment_number}, POST /api/public/certificate-requests, GET /api/public/verify/{verification_id}
Private endpoints correctly require Certificate Manager or Admin role
WhatsApp certificate_ready event properly configured in settings with variables [name, certificate_id, course]
ActivityTracker component properly implemented with 30-min inactivity timeout and 2-min warning before logout
QR code library (qrcode) used for frontend certificate generation
seed_data_creation: Certificate requests created during testing for PBPTKE0001 enrollment
context_for_next_testing_agent: Certificate Management System is fully working. Two certificate requests exist with status 'Ready' (ETI-2026-00001 and ETI-2026-00002). The public certificate request page at /certificate-request allows students to enter enrollment number, auto-fetches their details, and submits certificate request. Certificate Manager can access /certificates page to view/approve/reject/download certificates. Download generates PDF on frontend using canvas and includes QR code for verification. Public verification at /verify/{verification_id} shows certificate details if valid and status is Ready.

mocked_apis.MSG91 WhatsApp API: WhatsApp notifications configured but MSG91 integration is present - sends real notifications if MSG91_AUTH_KEY is valid
mocked_apis.Certificate PDF Generation: PDF is generated on frontend using HTML canvas, not server-side

features_verified.Public certificate request page /certifi: WORKING - Fetches enrollment details, submits request
features_verified.GET /api/public/enrollment/{enrollment_n: WORKING - Returns student details for certificate request
features_verified.GET /api/certificate-requests: WORKING - Certificate Manager and Admin can access
features_verified.POST /api/certificate-requests/{id}/reje: WORKING - Rejects pending request with reason
features_verified.POST /api/certificate-requests/{id}/down: WORKING - Returns certificate data and marks as Ready
features_verified.GET /api/public/verify/{verification_id}: WORKING - Public verification returns certificate details
features_verified.Certificate Manager role in Admin Panel: WORKING - Role visible in user creation form
features_verified.ActivityTracker 30-min auto-logout: IMPLEMENTED - Component in App.js, shows warning at 28 mins

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/auth/login - Admin and Certificate Manager login
